message:
🐛 Fix developer channel update notifications never appearing (#1272)

Two bugs prevented dev-install users from seeing update notifications:

1. Default channel was "stable" for all installs, but isNewerVersion()
   suppresses notifications for dev versions on non-developer channels.
   Now defaults to "developer" channel when running on localhost.

2. UpdateIndicator checked `!latestRelease` which is always null for
   the developer channel (it uses SHA comparison, not releases). Now
   shows the green badge using autoUpdateStatus for developer channel.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
